message:
fix(tui): add missing T and [ keybindings to help overlay views section

Add the Tree view (T) and Label Dashboard ([) toggle entries to the
Views section of the help overlay so all view mode hotkeys are
documented. These were added as view modes but their keybindings were
omitted from the help text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
